A.text: The range of wind speeds is larger in the central United States than along the West Coast.

B.text: The range of wind speeds is smaller in the central United States than along the East Coast.

C.text: Wind speeds are approximately equal along the East and West Coasts.

D.text: Wind speeds are higher along the West Coast than in the central United States.

parsed.answer_value: The range of wind speeds is larger in the central United States than along the West Coast.
parsed.rationale: The map shows a wider range of wind speeds in the central United States, with darker shades indicating higher wind speeds, compared to the West Coast, which has lighter shades indicating lower wind speeds.
